descriptionInUI: Runtime for the Vietnam Ops suite -- opt-in period air-war mechanics gated by the 'Vietnam Ops' campaign settings page. Inert unless a Vietnam Ops setting is on (the mission generator emits dcsRetribution.VietnamOps only then). Arc Light: a heavy-bomber (B-52) Strike walks a carpet of bombs across its target at the run-in instead of dropping a single aimpoint (tactical strikers unaffected). AAA flak gauntlet: aircraft within range and below the ceiling of an opposing AAA gun draw barrage flak that tightens against predictable run-ins and widens when jinking. Naval gunfire support: offshore gun ships shell shore targets -- a player F10 'Naval Fire Mission' menu fires on the last F10 map marker, and (optionally) ships automatically bombard the nearest in-range enemy ground target each cadence. Coastal campaigns only. Convoy interdiction: a moving enemy truck column rolls the supply road nearest the front (Steel Tiger / Ho Chi Minh Trail), halts under cover when an aircraft closes in, and re-rolls a fresh column after it is wiped -- hunt it via an Armed Recon corridor. Airbase harassment: forward, opposing-occupied airfields draw sporadic standoff rocket/mortar fire near the ramp after a startup grace period; your own spawn fields are never targeted. Super Gaggle: a formation of transport helos runs supplies into a cut-off forward friendly outpost (launch -> outpost -> back, re-rolling on a cadence), which the player can fly escort for -- the Khe Sanh hilltop resupply.
